top_signals.title: Prices Jump in France, Italy and Spain to Bolster ECB Hike Case
top_signals.summary: Inflation jumped in France, Italy and Spain, backing the case for the European Central Bank to raise interest rates for the first time since 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Remaining Anchored: Monetary Policy in an unpredictable World - Speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the Reykjavík Economic Conference 2026, Iceland
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Andy Burnham adapted his politics to skyscraper city
top_signals.summary: Greater Manchester mayor is well-versed in showing solidarity with voters over housing, but his policy record is complicated

top_signals.title: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
top_signals.summary: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Prices for over 1,000 food items in Japan set to rise in June
top_signals.summary: Seasoning accounted for the largest share of products set to see higher prices, followed by processed food.
